channel.title: GitHub Shell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: mylinuxforwork/dotfiles
item.description: The ML4W Dotfiles for Hyprland - An advanced and full-featured configuration for the dynamic tiling window manager Hyprland including an easy to use installation script for Arch based Linux distributions.

item.title: kaldi-asr/kaldi
item.description: kaldi-asr/kaldi is the official location of the Kaldi project.

item.title: ublue-os/bazzite
item.description: Bazzite is a cloud native image built upon Fedora Atomic Desktops that brings the best of Linux gaming to all of your devices - including your favorite handheld.

item.title: prasanthrangan/hyprdots
item.description: // Aesthetic, dynamic and minimal dots for Arch hyprland

item.title: itzg/docker-minecraft-server
item.description: Docker image that provides a Minecraft Server that will automatically download selected version at startup

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: kiddin9/Kwrt
item.description: 一分钟在线定制编译 X86/64, NanoPi R2S R4S R5S R6S, 斐讯 Phicomm N1 K2P, 树莓派 Raspberry Pi, 香橙派 Orange Pi, 红米AX6, 小米AX3600, 小米AX9000, 红米AX6S 小米AX3200, 红米AC2100, 华硕ASUS, 网件NETGEAR 等主流软硬路由

item.title: docker-mailserver/docker-mailserver
item.description: Production-ready fullstack but simple mail server (SMTP, IMAP, LDAP, Antispam, Antivirus, etc.) running inside a container.
